scripts.check:stage2: npm run build && npm run test:stage2 && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.check:stage3: npm run build && npm run test:stage2 && npm run test:stage3 && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.check:stage4: npm run build && npm run test:stage2 && npm run test:stage3 && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.check:stage5: npm run build && npm run test:stage2 && npm run test:stage3 && npm run test:stage5 && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
